speaker: Alice
text: I can’t take it anymore, Marco... I’ve asked you a thousand times to listen to me.

speaker: Marco
text: And I did listen! It’s just that you always exaggerate everything.

speaker: Alice
text: That’s not true... when I come home tired and just want a little attention, you’re glued to your phone.

speaker: Marco
text: Don’t you understand that I also need my space? It’s not always all about you.

speaker: Alice
text: See? That’s the point. We’re not a team anymore.

speaker: Alice
text: No, Marco. I feel alone even when you’re right next to me.

speaker: Marco
text: You can’t just throw away years like this, over a moment of anger.

speaker: Alice
text: It’s not a moment, it’s been going on for months.

speaker: Marco
text: So for you there’s nothing left to save?

speaker: Alice
text: I’d like to believe there is... but I don’t see the same light in your eyes anymore.

speaker: Marco
text: Maybe you’re right. Maybe I’m not the person you need anymore.

speaker: Alice
text: Maybe... and that breaks my heart.
